items.title: Montreal-based Stathera, a maker of MEMS-based silicon timing components for chips, raised a $55M Series B led by Maverick Silicon, taking total funding to $75M (Madison McLauchlan/BetaKit)
items.title_original: Montreal-based Stathera, a maker of MEMS-based silicon timing components for chips, raised a $55M Series B led by Maverick Silicon, taking total funding to $75M (Madison McLauchlan/BetaKit)
items.title_en: Montreal-based Stathera, a maker of MEMS-based silicon timing components for chips, raised a $55M Series B led by Maverick Silicon, taking total funding to $75M (Madison McLauchlan/BetaKit)

你不会往语言模型里灌垃圾数据，你知道数据质量决定模型质量。但很多人对自己的书架毫无门槛：畅销榜推什么读什么，等于拿互联网噪声训练自己的神经网络。
